name: Check Pipeline Status After Push
description: After the agent completes work, reminds to check CircleCI pipeline status if code was pushed to a remote branch.

then.prompt: If code was pushed to a remote branch during this session, use the CircleCI MCP server's get_latest_pipeline_status tool to check the pipeline status. Report the current state. If there are failures, offer to retrieve the failure logs. If no push was made, do nothing.
